shadow.$comment: Elevation system formalised in v4.4 (00b-v4.4-token-extension brief). Three-stop stack lifted verbatim from the audit-pack demo CSS (audit-deliverable/styles/tokens-v4.2.1.css), which had become de-facto canon by way of the V2 demo HTMLs even though the values had never landed in tokens/. The promotion eliminates the demo-vs-source drift surface that triggered BLOCKER 1 of Elena G4's review. No new primitive colours; no behavioural change vs the values demos already render.

raised.$description: Cards at rest. Subtle separation from the surface plane.

floating.$description: Floating panels — dropdowns, popovers, composition surfaces.
